title: Radical Compassion
author: Tara Brach
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- Four vertical lines of rain falling, each labeled R-A-I-N. The N line is RED. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1100)" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif">
    <!-- 4 columns of rain -->
    <g stroke-width="1.5" fill="none">
      <g transform="translate(-540 0)">
        <line x1="0" y1="-340" x2="0" y2="-160" stroke="#cccccc"/>
        <line x1="-12" y1="-280" x2="-12" y2="-220" stroke="#cccccc" opacity="0.6"/>
        <line x1="12" y1="-260" x2="12" y2="-200" stroke="#cccccc" opacity="0.6"/>
        <line x1="-22" y1="-200" x2="-22" y2="-170" stroke="#cccccc" opacity="0.4"/>
        <line x1="22" y1="-220" x2="22" y2="-180" stroke="#cccccc" opacity="0.4"/>
        <text x="0" y="60" text-anchor="middle" font-size="120" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="-0.05em">R</text>
        <text x="0" y="120" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.18em">RECOGNIZE</text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(-180 0)">
        <line x1="0" y1="-340" x2="0" y2="-160" stroke="#cccccc"/>
        <line x1="-12" y1="-280" x2="-12" y2="-220" stroke="#cccccc" opacity="0.6"/>
        <line x1="12" y1="-260" x2="12" y2="-200" stroke="#cccccc" opacity="0.6"/>
        <line x1="-22" y1="-200" x2="-22" y2="-170" stroke="#cccccc" opacity="0.4"/>
        <line x1="22" y1="-220" x2="22" y2="-180" stroke="#cccccc" opacity="0.4"/>
        <text x="0" y="60" text-anchor="middle" font-size="120" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="-0.05em">A</text>
        <text x="0" y="120" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.18em">ALLOW</text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(180 0)">
        <line x1="0" y1="-340" x2="0" y2="-160" stroke="#cccccc"/>
        <line x1="-12" y1="-280" x2="-12" y2="-220" stroke="#cccccc" opacity="0.6"/>
        <line x1="12" y1="-260" x2="12" y2="-200" stroke="#cccccc" opacity="0.6"/>
        <line x1="-22" y1="-200" x2="-22" y2="-170" stroke="#cccccc" opacity="0.4"/>
        <line x1="22" y1="-220" x2="22" y2="-180" stroke="#cccccc" opacity="0.4"/>
        <text x="0" y="60" text-anchor="middle" font-size="120" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="-0.05em">I</text>
        <text x="0" y="120" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.18em">INVESTIGATE</text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(540 0)">
        <line x1="0" y1="-340" x2="0" y2="-160" stroke="#fc1c46"/>
        <line x1="-12" y1="-280" x2="-12" y2="-220" stroke="#fc1c46" opacity="0.6"/>
        <line x1="12" y1="-260" x2="12" y2="-200" stroke="#fc1c46" opacity="0.6"/>
        <line x1="-22" y1="-200" x2="-22" y2="-170" stroke="#fc1c46" opacity="0.4"/>
        <line x1="22" y1="-220" x2="22" y2="-180" stroke="#fc1c46" opacity="0.4"/>
        <text x="0" y="60" text-anchor="middle" font-size="120" font-weight="300" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="-0.05em">N</text>
        <text x="0" y="120" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.18em">NURTURE</text>
      </g>
    </g>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: The RAIN practice visualized as four columns of rain falling, each labeled R, A, I, N. The N column (Nurture) is RED — the only chromatic element, and the action that completes the practice. 280px whisper title at the bottom.
